title: Hamble Greenblade ERGONOMIC COMPACT BYPASS PRUNER
features: This durable compact bypass pruner is manufactured with a #5 high carbon steel, Teflon coated upper blade & chrome plated lower blade.
It also comes with a safety lock & PP +TPR ergonomic comfortable grip handle for user comfort.
With a dedicated Customer Service Team committed to providing peace of mind from our door to yours.
